name: Oven Shrimps and Cheese Fondue
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove crusts from the bread and cut into cubes.
2. Beat eggs, milk, and seasonings together.
3. Add bread cubes, onion, cheese, and shrimp to the egg mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into an ungreased baking dish.
5. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 50 minutes, uncovered.
6. Serve immediately.
